statement.en: On the local classification of four-dimensional Lorentzian real reductive pairs
statement.summary: One important piece of work in the classifications started by the seminal works of S. Lie is the classification of four-dimensional Lorentzian real reductive pairs. This classification appeared, except for one paper, as preprints of the University of Oslo, where moreover many proofs and implications are (necessarily, due to their length) greatly abridged. Given the relevance of these classifications, we think that an article on the origin, context, methods and relevance of that classification is in order. This is precisely the aim of the present paper. We intend to fill the gaps in the exposition of the ideas that structure these proofs. On the other hand, motivated by the physical applications, in a previous work we studied which of Lorentzian symmetric pairs furnish connected simply-conn

proposer: Marco Castrillón López, Pedro Martínez Gadea, Boris Komrakov et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper is dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely error or preprint metadata), categorized under cs.AI despite mathematical/differential geometry content. Claims to fill gaps in existing classification work by Lie and others. Core theorems appear to reference established but scattered results. Status is explicitly expository/clarification work on existing proofs, not new foundational claims. Classified as FLOWING due to: (1) apparent preprint status, (2) date anomaly suggesting unvalidated metadata, (3) role as synthesis/reorganization rather than novel axiomatic claim.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 四次元ローレンツ空間では、対称性の深さが表現の分岐を通じて見える。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 四次元の光円錐は、リー群の軌道構造の中で光と影の階層をかたちづくる。
